name: Fairways of Woodside Golf Course
about: Fairways of Woodside Golf Course is an 18-hole championship course located in Sussex, Wisconsin. The facility features outdoor golf as well as indoor Trackman4 golf simulators, allowing for year-round play. The venue offers various membership options and is equipped with a remodeled Event Center and a Bar & Grill, making it suitable for both individual practice and group events. It is a player-focused environment with no initiation fees or monthly minimums.
why_golfers_like_it: Utilizes Trackman4 launch monitors, known for being the most accurate in the market
Offers a full indoor simulator experience with over 100 world-class golf courses available
Provides a year-round golf environment with comfortable and easy-to-reserve simulator bays
Features a remodeled Event Center suitable for tournaments and gatherings
Includes a full-service Bar & Grill with food and drinks available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food options served at the Bar & Grill.
Full-service bar available on-site, with cold drinks and drink specials.

simulator_hardware.notes: Four Trackman4 simulators are available for use, described as the most accurate launch monitors on the market.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use on the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service Bar & Grill with food and drinks available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but simulators can be booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a Junior Golf Membership for ages 18 and under.
